title: RNA velocity analysis of human retinal organoids
author: Steinheuer, Lisa Maria
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The scVelo package (Bergen, V., Lange, M., Peidli, S. et al. , 2020) was used to derive RNA velocities from two human retinal organoid models. 

 Using the PAGA tool (Wolf, F.A., Hamey, F.K., Plass, M. et al., 2019), abstracted graphs of the cell types and the pseudotime assessment were visualized
steps_raw:
The scVelo package (Bergen, V., Lange, M., Peidli, S. et al. , 2020) was used to derive RNA velocities from two human retinal organoid models. 

 Using the PAGA tool (Wolf, F.A., Hamey, F.K., Plass, M. et al., 2019), abstracted graphs of the cell types and the pseudotime assessment were visualized
